title: Door
description: A physical door for goods receipt or goods dispatch, staging inventory in a designated section.

direction.description: inbound: goods receipt door. outbound: goods dispatch door. returns: reverse-logistics door, kept separate from normal inbound so returns can be routed/inspected differently.

staging_section.description: Reference to a section of a storage_type in the form '<storage_type_id>.<section_id>', e.g. 'STAGING.SEC_STAGING_OUT'.

determination_group.description: Load unit type group used for door/gate determination, e.g. 'pallets'.
